metadata.description: Reviewing all TRACE usage in this project to produce a summary of the protocol's deployment

summary: Completed comprehensive audit of TRACE protocol usage in the When Algorithms Meet Artists project. Found 18 sessions spanning Jan 29 – Feb 16, 2026, across three protocol versions (v1.0 → v0.1 → v0.2). Key findings: 51+ total events, 6 formal decisions (all accepted), 5 contributions with direction/execution attribution, 24 annotations (12 observations, 7 learnings, 5 gotchas), and the pivotal intervention H001 where the human caught TRACE over-attributing work to AI. Identified known gaps: project name inconsistency (spaces vs hyphens), S003 session inaccessible in current API, and several empty sessions.

annotation.content: Completed full audit of TRACE usage in this project. Found 18 total sessions (8 under 'When Algorithms Meet Artists', 10 under 'When-Algorithms-Meet-Artists' with hyphens), spanning Jan 29 - Feb 16, 2026. The data covers the full lifecycle: v1.0 monolith server → v0.1 migration → v0.2 upgrade. Includes the critical G003 gotcha (TRACE itself was over-attributing to AI), 4 formal decisions, 7 learnings, 5 contributions with direction/execution attribution, and the protocol's own evolution story.
